deck: Jackie Huh of the Stop TB Partnership and Dr. Kelly Collins of SureAdhere on Reimagining TB Care, a 360-degree, people-centered approach to one of the world's most fatal infectious diseases.
seo_description: Jackie Huh of Stop TB Partnership and SureAdhere's Dr. Kelly Collins on Reimagining TB Care and putting people at the center of TB tech innovation.
og_description: Reimagining TB Care: a people-centered approach to tuberculosis, with Stop TB's Jackie Huh and SureAdhere's Dr. Kelly Collins.
about: Tuberculosis ranks as the second most fatal infectious disease after COVID-19. It is a widespread contagion and a pervasive public health emergency that requires patients to undergo intensive treatment regimes. The Stop TB Partnership, a hosted entity of the United Nations Office for Project Services (UNOPS), is a collective force working to transform the fight against TB globally.

In this episode, Jackie Huh, one of the initiators behind Stop TB's Reimagining TB Care initiative, explains how it addresses the intricate challenges of combating tuberculosis through a comprehensive 360-degree, people-centered approach. She is joined by Dr. Kelly Collins, co-creator of SureAdhere's VDOT, to discuss what it takes to design TB treatment and care around the people living it.
bullets: Reimagining TB Care: how Stop TB's initiative rethinks treatment around the people living through it
A 360-degree, people-centered approach to one of the world's most fatal infectious diseases
Inside the Stop TB Partnership, a UNOPS-hosted collective force transforming the global fight against TB
SureAdhere's VDOT: video-supported treatment adherence, with co-creator Dr. Kelly Collins
The weight of intensive treatment regimes and why patient experience has to come first
Putting people at the center: bringing technology and care together for TB patients

guests.name: Dr. Kelly Collins
guests.role: Co-creator of VDOT, video-supported treatment for TB patients.
